description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push, pull requests, and a weekly schedule. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems and Python versions, including Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS with Python 3.5 to 3.13 and PyPy. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies with pip and tox, run tests with tox, and upload coverage to Codecov.
